gaps: CourtListener MCP server did not connect in this cell, so no docket/opinion/citation retrieval was available

ca11 rows returned by fedcourts query are misjoined/noisy, so the priors surface was unusable for this circuit
no documented mapping for how reconcile labels appellate merits outcomes (affirmed/reversed) into the disposition enum — predictors must infer it from source code
helpful: metrics/statpack.md by-court cut (the CA11 label distribution anchored the prediction)
readable pipeline source (normalize_disposition, outcome.py, reconcile.md) for label-space semantics
notes: Forward cell predicted on provisioned inputs + committed base rates only. The two fedcourts query calls (~40 MB ranged reads) contributed nothing substantive because the ca11 corpus rows are misjoined; a per-circuit appeal-outcome statpack cut would have been worth more than the priors query.
